name: selo-messenger
description: Build tooling for committed SELO browser assets

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.build:js: node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild public/assets/emoji-picker.js --minify --target=es2019 --outfile=public/assets/build/emoji-picker.js && node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild public/assets/app.js --minify --target=es2019 --outfile=public/assets/build/app.js
scripts.build:css: node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild public/assets/style.css --minify --outfile=public/assets/build/style.css && node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild public/assets/css/app.css --minify --outfile=public/assets/build/app.css
